summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully. All 3 new features/fixes verified: (1) Sidebar icons visible when collapsed - BUG FIX VERIFIED, (2) BOM CSV import with sub_recipe column - WORKING, (3) Import Center with API REST, SFTP, and History tabs - WORKING. All 48 backend tests passed (34 existing + 14 new). All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests (TEST_ prefixed) is cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features working correctly: (1) Sidebar collapse shows icons via CSS .sidebar.collapsed rules, (2) BOM CSV import at POST /api/recipes/import-bom-csv supports sub_recipe column format 'RecipeName:quantity:unit', (3) Import Center at /import-center has 3 tabs - API REST for manual uploads, SFTP/Dossier for watch directory scanning, Historique for import logs. Dashboard shows 12 materials, 5 recipes. Recipe detail shows sub-recipes section with amber background.

sidebar_collapse_fix.details: Icons visible in collapsed state, CSS class .sidebar.collapsed applied correctly, toggle button works

bom_csv_import.template_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/recipes/bom-csv-template returns CSV with sub_recipe column
bom_csv_import.import_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/recipes/import-bom-csv imports intermediate and final recipes
bom_csv_import.ui_dialog: PASS - Import dialog opens from BOM Tree page with instructions

import_center.api_tab: PASS - Shows import type selector, file upload, API documentation
import_center.sftp_tab: PASS - Shows watch directory /app/backend/import_watch, pending/processed counts, scan button
import_center.history_tab: PASS - Shows import log entries with timestamps and results

import_status.endpoint: PASS - GET /api/import/status returns config and history

dashboard.stats: PASS - Shows 12 materials, 5 recipes, 1 overhead, 5.49€ avg cost

recipe_detail.sub_recipes_section: PASS - Shows 'Articles semi-finis (sous-recettes)' with amber background
recipe_detail.labor_costs: PASS - Shows Preparation and Cuisson with hours and rates
recipe_detail.cost_breakdown: PASS - Shows materials, labor, overhead costs

materials_page.freinte_column: PASS - Shows freinte % in red for materials with waste percentage
